description: Salesloft is a sales engagement platform with cadences, AI guidance, and conversation intelligence that helps revenue teams prospect, manage deals, and forecast.
overview: Salesloft organizes outreach into cadences, uses AI to prioritize the next best action, and layers in conversation intelligence and forecasting so revenue teams execute consistently.
what_is: Salesloft is a sales engagement platform that gives revenue teams a system for what to do next. It structures outreach into cadences, uses AI to flag the highest-priority actions, and brings prospecting, deal management, and forecasting into one workflow.

It is strong for building pipeline, moving deals forward, coaching reps, and forecasting revenue, and it serves sales development, account executives, and customer success alike. Teams use it to keep large numbers of touches organized and consistent.

Salesloft connects to your CRM, email, calendar, and conferencing tools and sits at the center of the selling motion. It is not a replacement for a core CRM or ERP; it focuses on sales execution and the workflows that drive revenue.
